description: First quest introducing uppercase letter A, sound /a/, and A-words (apple, ant, astronaut, anchor, acorn)

Friendly cartoon tutor character, excited happy expression, arms raised in celebration, simple 2D style, bold black outlines, flat colors, transparent background

Friendly cartoon tutor character, encouraging expression, thumbs up, supportive pose, simple 2D style, bold black outlines, flat colors, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, waving hello, welcoming expression, simple 2D style, bold black outlines, flat colors, transparent background

ui.prompt: Game UI button, rounded rectangle, orange color with gradient, white border, simple 2D cartoon style, flat design, friendly, suitable for kids app
Game UI button, rounded rectangle, blue color with gradient, white border, simple 2D cartoon style, flat design, friendly, suitable for kids app
Progress bar UI frame, rounded rectangle, gray border, empty inside for fill, simple 2D cartoon style, suitable for kids app
Gold star icon, filled, shiny, cartoon style, simple 2D, suitable for achievement/reward

indicator, circular arrow, orange color, cartoon style, simple 2D, encouraging

narration.text: Hi there! I'm excited to learn with you today. We're going on an adventure to meet a very special letter. Are you ready?
Great! Today we're going to meet... the letter A!
This is the letter A. It makes the sound /a/... like in 'apple'! Can you say /a/?
The letter A is the first letter of the alphabet. Let me show you some things that start with A!
A is for... apple! /a/... /a/... apple!
A is for... ant! /a/... /a/... ant!
A is for... astronaut! /a/... /a/... astronaut!
A is for... anchor! /a/... /a/... anchor!
A is for... acorn! /a/... /a/... acorn!
Look at all these letters! Some are the letter A, and some are other letters. Can you find ALL the letter A's? Tap every A you see!
Yes! That's an A!
That's a B. Look for the A!
Remember, A has two slanted lines and a crossbar in the middle. Like a triangle without the bottom!
Fantastic! You found all the A's! You're becoming an A expert!
Now let's learn to write the letter A! Use your finger to trace the dotted lines. Start at the top...
...go down to the left... then up to the top... then down to the right... and finally, draw a line across the middle!
Perfect! You wrote an A! Look at that beautiful letter!
You're working hard! The letter A can be tricky. Let's try one more time together...
Now for the big challenge! Which of these pictures starts with the /a/ sound? Tap the one that starts with A!
Yes! Apple starts with /a/!
Yes! Astronaut starts with /a/!
Ball starts with /b/. Listen... /b/... /b/... ball. Find the /a/ sound!
Cat starts with /c/. Listen... /c/... /c/... cat. Find the /a/ sound!
INCREDIBLE! You found TWO things that start with A! Apple and astronaut both start with /a/! You're a true A expert now!
You did it! You completed the Letter A quest! You learned the sound /a/, found A's in a crowd, wrote an A, and found A words!
Great work today! Remember: A says /a/ like apple, ant, and astronaut! See you next time!

sfx.description: Gentle tap sound when child touches screen
Gentle boop for wrong answer (not harsh)
Victory fanfare when quest complete (3-4 seconds)
